title: Wynnventory
description: View Wynncraft trademarket data, lootrun and raid lootpools!
body:
**Wynnventory – Your Ultimate Wynncraft Loot Companion**  

Dive deeper into Wynncraft’s raids and lootruns with real-time data and powerful new in-game tools!

---

### Key Features

- **Price Tooltips**  
  Hover over any item—or even boxed items—to display price information from historic trademarket listings of the last 7 days. Crowdsourced data ensures you always know an item’s true value without leaving your inventory.

![item_tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21387dd3d67c5ce92907d31db13a25777ce60aa9.gif)

- **In-Game Raid & Lootrun Screen**  
  Press your the hotkey "N" to open our brand-new in-game screen from anywhere in the world. Quickly browse the current rewards available from raids and lootruns without tabbing out!

![ingame_screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d1e0ea79f9421054a18c9611e5f3cf7711e4fb.gif)

- **Favorite Notifier**  
  Get alerts for any of your Wynntils “favorited” items and you’ll receive an instant alert whenever it appears in the active raid or lootrun reward pools. Never miss out on that perfect drop!

![fav_notifier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad12ed8fd7fc111e04b898ff33f961534a1643e.png)

- **Material & Ingredient Tooltips**  
  We now support all material and ingredient items used in crafting and brewing. Hover over any ingredient to see recent price trends and demand insights at a glance.

![mat_tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/530efa6afb8c66579558eedbbbb149df51b44e8a.gif)

- **Aspect Tooltips**  
  Planning your next raid? Hover over any raid in the party finder to view its mythic aspects right there in the tooltip. While queueing, browse the full list of available mythic aspects to pick the perfect challenge.

![aspect_info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320fd66c29e9a27815fd48c97f0d1866349cb038.gif)

---

### How It Works

- **Data Collection**  
  Every time you view the trademarket or inspect raid/lootrun reward chests, your client sends anonymized price and reward‐pool data to our backend. This crowdsourced approach powers both in-game tooltips and our website analytics.

- **Customization**  
  Tailor Wynnventory to your playstyle. Open the configuration menu (hotkey or Esc → Mods → Wynnventory) and choose exactly which stats, tooltips, and notifications you want to see.

---

### Get Even More on wynnventory.com  
For deep dives into price histories, trend charts, and community-driven analytics, visit our website at [wynnventory.com](https://wynnventory.com).  

---

Elevate your trading and raiding experience—install the new Wynnventory update today!
